declared_runtime.title: Declared runtime witness
declared_runtime.description: Proof that the active service and environment binding resolves to a live runtime witness instead of only a catalog row.

health.title: Health semantics
health.description: Stage-appropriate startup, readiness, liveness, and degraded-state evidence as summarized by the current health composite.

route.title: Route truth
route.description: Proof that the declared publication or operator path matches the active hostname and environment.

tls.title: TLS posture
tls.description: Proof that declared HTTPS surfaces negotiate successfully on the live path and still align with the publication contract.

smoke.title: Smoke verification
smoke.description: Recent human-meaningful smoke evidence from governed live-apply receipts or equivalent deployment verification.

browser_journey.title: Browser journey
browser_journey.description: Recent login, post-login, and logout evidence for browser-driven operator or human-facing surfaces.

log_queryability.title: Log queryability
log_queryability.description: Recent evidence that the service's logs reach the shared query surface or an approved equivalent.

private_service.title: Private service
private_service.description: Private supporting service with no operator browser surface as a required stage contract.

private_browser_surface.title: Private browser surface
private_browser_surface.description: Private operator-facing browser surface that still needs recent smoke and login evidence even without public publication.

edge_informational_surface.title: Informational edge surface
edge_informational_surface.description: Published informational surface whose route and TLS posture are required while deeper smoke or browser proof remains best-effort.

edge_browser_surface.title: Edge browser surface
edge_browser_surface.description: Public or operator-facing browser surface that requires route, TLS, smoke, and browser-journey proof.

edge_api_surface.title: Edge API surface
edge_api_surface.description: Published API surface that requires route, TLS, and smoke proof but not a browser journey.

api_gateway.notes: The gateway is a published API rather than a browser workflow.

headscale.notes: The published health and API surfaces matter more than a browser journey.

backup_pbs.notes: PBS has a private operator web surface.

gitea.notes: Gitea is a private browser-driven operator surface.

mattermost.notes: Mattermost is a private browser-driven collaboration surface.

netbox.notes: NetBox is a private operator browser surface.

ntopng.notes: ntopng exposes a private browser UI.

portainer.notes: Portainer is a private browser runtime surface.

searxng.notes: SearXNG is a private browser search surface.

vaultwarden.notes: Vaultwarden is a private browser credential surface.

windmill.notes: Windmill has a private browser operator surface.

semaphore.notes: Semaphore is a private browser automation surface.

coolify_apps.notes: The wildcard ingress is shared infrastructure rather than one browser app.
